---
title: "Sample_Clustering"
output: html_document
---
```{rsetup }
# ============================================================
# UNSUPERVISED CLUSTERING — All Samples (No Labels)
# Based on VST-transformed counts, top 500 variable genes
# ============================================================

library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dendextend)
library(factoextra)   # for fviz_cluster (k-means viz)

output_dir <- "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/CLUSTERING_RESULTS"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ============================================================
# Re-use the vst_all object from your PCA script
# (run this in the same R session, or reload vst_all)
# ============================================================

# Extract VST matrix — top 500 most variable genes
vst_mat <- assay(vst_all)

top500 <- order(rowVars(vst_mat), decreasing = TRUE)[1:500]
vst_top <- vst_mat[top500, ]

# ============================================================
# PLOT 1: Sample-to-Sample Distance Heatmap
# Euclidean distance between all pairs of samples
# ============================================================

sample_dists <- dist(t(vst_top), method = "euclidean")
dist_matrix  <- as.matrix(sample_dists)

# Color palette
heat_colors <- colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(9, "Blues")))(255)

pdf(file.path(output_dir, "Sample_Distance_Heatmap.pdf"), width = 14, height = 12)
pheatmap(
  dist_matrix,
  clustering_distance_rows = sample_dists,
  clustering_distance_cols = sample_dists,
  clustering_method        = "complete",
  color                    = heat_colors,
  show_rownames            = TRUE,
  show_colnames            = TRUE,
  fontsize                 = 7,
  main                     = "Sample-to-Sample Euclidean Distance\n(Top 500 Variable Genes, Unsupervised)"
)
dev.off()

png(file.path(output_dir, "Sample_Distance_Heatmap.png"),
    width = 1400, height = 1200, res = 150)
pheatmap(
  dist_matrix,
  clustering_distance_rows = sample_dists,
  clustering_distance_cols = sample_dists,
  clustering_method        = "complete",
  color                    = heat_colors,
  show_rownames            = TRUE,
  show_colnames            = TRUE,
  fontsize                 = 7,
  main                     = "Sample-to-Sample Euclidean Distance\n(Top 500 Variable Genes, Unsupervised)"
)
dev.off()
cat("Plot 1 saved: Sample_Distance_Heatmap\n")

# ============================================================
# PLOT 2: Hierarchical Clustering Dendrogram
# ============================================================

hc <- hclust(sample_dists, method = "complete")

pdf(file.path(output_dir, "Hierarchical_Clustering_Dendrogram.pdf"), width = 18, height = 7)
par(mar = c(10, 4, 4, 2))
plot(hc,
     main  = "Hierarchical Clustering — All Samples (Unsupervised)",
     sub   = "Euclidean distance | Complete linkage | Top 500 variable genes",
     xlab  = "",
     ylab  = "Distance",
     cex   = 0.65)
abline(h = 30, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 1.2)  # visual cut line — adjust h as needed
dev.off()
cat("Plot 2 saved: Hierarchical_Clustering_Dendrogram\n")

# ============================================================
# PLOT 3: K-Means Clustering on PCA space
# Try k = 3 (one per genotype), change as needed
# ============================================================

pca_coords <- prcomp(t(vst_top), scale. = FALSE)
pca_df     <- as.data.frame(pca_coords$x[, 1:2])
pca_df$sample_id <- rownames(pca_df)

# --- Elbow plot to help choose k ---
set.seed(42)
fviz_nbclust(pca_df[, 1:2], kmeans, method = "wss", k.max = 10) +
  labs(title = "Elbow Method — Optimal k for K-Means") +
  theme_classic()
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "KMeans_Elbow_Plot.pdf"), width = 7, height = 5)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "KMeans_Elbow_Plot.png"), width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 150)

# --- K-means with k = 3 (adjust after looking at elbow plot) ---
set.seed(42)
k <- 3
km_res <- kmeans(pca_df[, 1:2], centers = k, nstart = 25)
pca_df$cluster <- factor(km_res$cluster)

p_km <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = cluster, label = sample_id)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 2, max.overlaps = 30,
                            box.padding = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = cluster), level = 0.75,
               linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = paste0("Cluster (k=", k, ")")) +
  labs(
    title    = paste0("K-Means Clustering (k = ", k, ") — All Samples"),
    subtitle = "No labels used — purely unsupervised | Top 500 variable genes",
    x = "PC1", y = "PC2"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10))

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "KMeans_Clustering_PCA.pdf"), p_km, width = 10, height = 7)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "KMeans_Clustering_PCA.png"), p_km, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 150)
cat("Plot 3 saved: KMeans_Clustering_PCA (k =", k, ")\n")

# ============================================================
# Save cluster assignments
# ============================================================

cluster_table <- pca_df %>%
  dplyr::select(sample_id, PC1, PC2, cluster) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(cluster)

write.csv(cluster_table,
          file.path(output_dir, "KMeans_Cluster_Assignments.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n========== OUTPUT FILES ==========\n")
cat("Saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("  - Sample_Distance_Heatmap.pdf/.png\n")
cat("  - Hierarchical_Clustering_Dendrogram.pdf/.png\n")
cat("  - KMeans_Elbow_Plot.pdf/.png\n")
cat("  - KMeans_Clustering_PCA.pdf/.png\n")
cat("  - KMeans_Cluster_Assignments.csv\n")
```
